message:
Add native zlib and AES-GCM crypto support

Zlib compression using C zlib library:
- hostGzip/hostGunzip: gzip format (wbits=31)
- hostDeflate/hostInflate: zlib format
- Auto-growing buffers for decompression
- Proper memory management

AES-256-GCM encryption via Zig std.crypto:
- hostAesGcmEncrypt: Encrypt with 32-byte key, 12-byte IV
- hostAesGcmDecrypt: Decrypt with auth tag verification
- hostRandomBytes: Cryptographically secure random

Native bindings for WASM:
- __edgebox_gzip, __edgebox_gunzip, __edgebox_deflate, __edgebox_inflate
- __edgebox_aes_gcm_encrypt, __edgebox_aes_gcm_decrypt
- __edgebox_random_bytes

Updated node_polyfill.js:
- zlib.gzipSync/gunzipSync/deflateSync/inflateSync use native
- crypto.subtle.encrypt/decrypt with AES-GCM support
- crypto.subtle.wrapKey/unwrapKey implementation

Build changes:
- Link zlib library (-lz) in build.zig
- Include zlib.h in cImport
